targets.queryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', as_of_date_local || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, portfolio_yield_pct AS YieldPct, portfolio_yield_on_cost_pct AS YoCPct FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', as_of_date_local || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, portfolio_yield_pct AS YieldPct, portfolio_yield_on_cost_pct AS YoCPct FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local

targets.queryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', as_of_date_local || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, dividends_projected_monthly AS ProjectedMTD, dividends_realized_mtd AS RealizedMTD, dividends_realized_30d AS Realized30d FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', as_of_date_local || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, dividends_projected_monthly AS ProjectedMTD, dividends_realized_mtd AS RealizedMTD, dividends_realized_30d AS Realized30d FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-120 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local

targets.queryText: WITH latest_day AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_dividends_upcoming), latest_period AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), u AS (SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, ex_date_est AS ExDate, COALESCE(pay_date_est,'') AS PayDate, round(amount_est,2) AS Amount FROM daily_dividends_upcoming WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM latest_day) ORDER BY ex_date_est LIMIT 4), p AS (SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, ex_date AS ExDate, COALESCE(pay_date,'') AS PayDate, round(amount,2) AS Amount FROM period_dividend_events WHERE (period_type,period_start_date,period_end_date) IN (SELECT period_type,period_start_date,period_end_date FROM latest_period) ORDER BY ex_date DESC LIMIT 2) SELECT Sym, ExDate, PayDate, Amount FROM (SELECT * FROM u UNION ALL SELECT * FROM p) ORDER BY ExDate LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest_day AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_dividends_upcoming), latest_period AS (SELECT period_type, period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), u AS (SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, ex_date_est AS ExDate, COALESCE(pay_date_est,'') AS PayDate, round(amount_est,2) AS Amount FROM daily_dividends_upcoming WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM latest_day) ORDER BY ex_date_est LIMIT 4), p AS (SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, ex_date AS ExDate, COALESCE(pay_date,'') AS PayDate, round(amount,2) AS Amount FROM period_dividend_events WHERE (period_type,period_start_date,period_end_date) IN (SELECT period_type,period_start_date,period_end_date FROM latest_period) ORDER BY ex_date DESC LIMIT 2) SELECT Sym, ExDate, PayDate, Amount FROM (SELECT * FROM u UNION ALL SELECT * FROM p) ORDER BY ExDate LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: WITH d AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_holdings) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(projected_monthly_dividend,2) AS MoInc, round(current_yield_pct,2) AS YieldPct, round(dividends_30d,2) AS Div30d FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM d) ORDER BY projected_monthly_dividend DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH d AS (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) AS d FROM daily_holdings) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(projected_monthly_dividend,2) AS MoInc, round(current_yield_pct,2) AS YieldPct, round(dividends_30d,2) AS Div30d FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT d FROM d) ORDER BY projected_monthly_dividend DESC LIMIT 5

title: B02 LMI v4 - Income and Dividends
description: Income reliability desk: projection vs realization, yield behavior, and near-term ex/pay pipeline.
